title: RobotSF ODD Hazard Coverage Matrix (v1)
description: Static coverage matrix mapping ODD conditions and hazard classes to scenario families, metrics, planners, and evidence tiers. Gaps are explicit; no benchmark success claim is implied.

id.description: Stable identifier for this coverage matrix.

claim_boundary.description: One-line conservative interpretation boundary for the whole matrix.

odd_contract_ref.description: ODD contract that bounds every row in this matrix.

hazard_traceability_ref.description: Optional hazard traceability mapping used to validate hazard classes.

coverage_rows.description: Coverage rows, one per ODD condition x hazard class x scenario family combination.

known_gaps.description: Machine-readable register of deliberately uncovered or blocked ODD/hazard rows.

source.description: Repository-relative path to the referenced contract file.

contract_id.description: Contract identifier inside the referenced file.

required_for_benchmark_claim.description: Whether the referenced contract must be valid before any benchmark claim can be made.

odd_condition.description: ODD condition or claim identifier from the referenced ODD contract.

hazard_class.description: Hazard class identifier, preferably from a hazard_traceability.v1 mapping.

scenario_family.description: Scenario family that is intended to exercise the hazard class.

metrics.description: Metrics that would be needed to claim coverage for this row.

included_planners.description: Planners included in checked-in benchmark configs that exercise this scenario family.

evidence_tier.description: Highest evidence tier this row is allowed to support.

status.description: Coverage status. Only 'covered' supports a checked-in-config coverage statement; all other statuses are caveats or gaps.

gap_reason.description: Required when status is not 'covered'; explains why the row is not fully covered.

source_configs.description: Checked-in config paths that justify the row content.

tracking_issue.description: Optional GitHub issue or document tracking when this gap will be addressed.
